name: v1.32.0
body:
## What's Changed
* [Security] Pin GitHub Actions to a full-length commit SHA by @juliendoutre in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-go/pull/237
* chore(deps): minor upgrades — 4 packages (minor: 4) [tests/integration_tests] by @gh-worker-campaigns-3e9aa4[bot] in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-go/pull/242
* chore(deps): github.com/aws/aws-xray-sdk-go/v2 (patch → v2.0.1)  by @gh-worker-campaigns-3e9aa4[bot] in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-go/pull/243
* fix: disable stats computation to prevent per-invocation latency in Lambda by @jchrostek-dd in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-go/pull/244

## New Contributors
* @juliendoutre made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-go/pull/237
* @jchrostek-dd made their first contribution in https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-go/pull/244

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DataDog/datadog-lambda-go/compare/v1.31.0...v1.32.0
